headline: Is LKQ (LKQ) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether LKQ at around US$31.58 is a bargain or a value trap, you are in the right place to size up what the current price might really offer you. The stock has returned 0.7% over the last 7 days and 7.5% over the last 30 days, yet over 1 year and 3 years the returns are 14.1% and 38.6% declines, which raises questions about how the market is currently viewing its prospects and risks. Recent attention on LKQ has focused on its position in the Retail Distributors space and...
